intro: Artemisia annua glycerite is a liquid herbal extract derived from the leaves of the sweet wormwood plant, Artemisia annua. This glycerite is often used in traditional medicine to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and alleviate fever-related symptoms. By suspending the extract in glycerin, the artemisia annua glycerite maintains the bioactive properties of the herb while providing a more palatable and easily absorbed liquid supplement.
